from target import days_in_month

def test_days_in_month():
    # Typical months with fixed days
    assert days_in_month(2021, 1) == 31
    assert days_in_month(2021, 4) == 30
    # February in leap and non‑leap years (function treats any non‑listed month as February)
    assert days_in_month(2020, 2) == 29  # leap year divisible by 4
    assert days_in_month(1900, 2) == 28  # century not leap (divisible by 100 but not 400)
    assert days_in_month(2000, 2) == 29  # century leap (divisible by 400)
